chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 161 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.02.2018. Mr. Sher Muhammad Laghari Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Jangu Khan Special Prosecutor NAB. -=-=- It is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that petitioner Rahim Bukhsh Soomro after full dress trial has been convicted and sentenced by the learned trial court, therefore, according to him, this constitutional petition has become infrucutuous and liable to be dismissed. Learned Special Prosecutor NAB has no objection. Under the circumstances, instant constitutional petition is dismissed as infructuous. Since the petitioner has been convicted and sentenced by the trial court, therefore, office is directed to return the surety paper/amount to the surety after proper identification and verification. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed/steno
